calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Miller for and with Alexander Schwarz (Petitioner).

Mr. Miller stated that there is nothing other than the house. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order). The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not Reported)
